title: Earth Atlas
description: Interactive 3D globe with country-level data overlays including life expectancy, CO2 emissions, renewable energy, and more.

title: Seismic Live
description: Real-time earthquake monitor with interactive map, tectonic plates overlay, seismograph waveform, and live USGS data feed.

title: Crypto Pulse
description: Live cryptocurrency dashboard with top 50 coins, sparkline charts, price flash animations, and multi-currency support via CoinGecko.

title: ISS Live Tracker
description: Real-time International Space Station tracking with orbital data, ground track trail, crew roster, and day/night terminator.

title: HN Live
description: Real-time Hacker News dashboard with top/best/new/ask/show feeds, domain analysis, activity graph, and streaming new stories.

title: Weather Pulse
description: Global weather dashboard with city search, hourly and 7-day forecasts, UV index, wind, humidity, and auto-location detection.

title: GitHub Pulse
description: Live visualization of public GitHub activity — pushes, stars, PRs, forks streaming in real-time with trending repos and language stats.

title: Wiki Live
description: Real-time Wikipedia edit stream via Server-Sent Events. Watch every edit across all language Wikipedias as it happens.

title: Aurora Watch
description: Space weather and aurora forecast dashboard with Kp index, solar wind, Bz component, flare alerts, and city-level aurora visibility.

title: Abalone
description: A polished 3D rendition of the classic marble-pushing board game with multiple camera angles, move previews, and complete rule enforcement.

title: Star Reaper '86
description: Retro side-scrolling shoot'em up with neon visuals, wave-based combat, boss encounters, and Xbox gamepad support.

title: Piano Studio
description: 3D piano studio with MIDI playback, waterfall note visualisation, multiple camera angles, and tempo controls.

title: Violin Ensemble
description: 3D string ensemble visualiser that distributes MIDI notes across violins, violas, cellos, and contrabasses with bow animation.

title: Brighton Hub
description: Live city dashboard for Brighton & Hove with real-time transport, environment, crime, housing, health, events, and schools data.
